Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IDeviceInfoCapability

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceInfoCapability
  • public class IDeviceInfoCapability
extends IObservableProperty
    The device info capability

    This class is an interface to the device info capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to get the device information from the audio device.

      Get the device build info string

      DeviceType getDeviceType()
      Getter for the DeviceType type for this device service
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventVolumeLevel()
      The event for volume level

      When the volume level has changed this event will be sent.

      This method can be used to get the string constant that notifies that
      a new volume level is available.
      To be used in the IPropertyObserver property_changed method.
      byte getVolumeLevel()
      Get the latest reported volume of the device

      Get the type of volume representation by calling
      get_volume_type().

      If type is unknown, this API will return 0
      IDeviceInfoCapability.VolumeType getVolumeType()
      Get the type of volume representation

      Get the type of volume representation received when calling
      get_volume_level()

      • getVolumeType

        public IDeviceInfoCapability.VolumeType getVolumeType()
        Get the type of volume representation

        Get the type of volume representation received when calling
        get_volume_level()

        Returns:
        Returns the type UNKNOWN, DBFS or INDEX

      • getVolumeLevel

        public byte getVolumeLevel()
        Get the latest reported volume of the device

        Get the type of volume representation by calling
        get_volume_type().

        If type is unknown, this API will return 0

        Returns:
        Returns the volume

      • getDeviceType

        public DeviceType getDeviceType()
        Getter for the DeviceType type for this device service

        Returns:
        A device type signifying whether the device is headset or earbuds.

      • getBuildInfo

        public java.lang.String getBuildInfo()
        Get the device build info string

        Returns:
        A string containing build info for the device.

      • getObservableEventVolumeLevel

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventVolumeLevel()
        The event for volume level

        When the volume level has changed this event will be sent.

        This method can be used to get the string constant that notifies that
        a new volume level is available.
        To be used in the IPropertyObserver property_changed method.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.
